parameters.query: SELECT dlq_id, client_id, entity_type, entity_id, workflow_name, error_type, error_message, retry_count, last_retry_at, created_at, updated_at FROM dead_letter_queue WHERE entity_type IN ('lead', 'lead_enrichment', 'lead_routing') AND retry_count < 5 AND status = 'failed' ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 20;
SELECT lead_id, client_id, email, first_name, last_name, company, phone, source, status, lead_score, raw_data FROM leads WHERE lead_id = $1;
SELECT enrichment_id, lead_id, client_id, enrichment_type, status, result_data, error_message FROM lead_enrichment WHERE enrichment_id = $1;
SELECT routing_id, lead_id, client_id, destination_type, destination_config, routing_status, sent_at FROM lead_routing WHERE routing_id = $1;
UPDATE dead_letter_queue SET retry_count = retry_count + 1, last_retry_at = NOW(), status = 'retrying', updated_at = NOW() WHERE dlq_id = $1;
UPDATE dead_letter_queue SET status = 'manual_review_required', error_message = CONCAT(error_message, ' - Requires manual review: ', $1), updated_at = NOW() WHERE dlq_id = $2;
INSERT INTO notifications (client_id, notification_type, message, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, 'dlq_manual_review', $2, 'unread', NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO workflow_executions (client_id, workflow_name, workflow_id, execution_id, status, input_data, output_data, started_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'completed', $5, $6, NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO workflow_executions (client_id, workflow_name, workflow_id, execution_id, status, input_data, output_data, started_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'completed', $5, $6, NOW(), NOW());
